---
name: Never push outdated settings_data.json
description: Always pull live settings_data.json before modifying it — never push a local copy that could be outdated
type: feedback
---

Never push a local settings_data.json without first pulling the live version. On 2026-03-25, pushing an outdated local copy overwrote live Shopify admin settings (header layout, logo, search bar config) and caused hours of debugging.

**Why:** settings_data.json is auto-generated by the Shopify admin. The local copy can be days/weeks behind the live version. Pushing it blindly destroys admin-side changes.

**How to apply:** Always `shopify theme pull --only "config/settings_data.json"` first, then make targeted edits to the pulled file, then push.
